title: Creamy Trofie Pasta with Roasted Chestnuts
description: A creamy Italian-inspired pasta dish loaded with roasted chestnuts and trofie pasta.
instructions: Roast the chestnuts in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Cook the trofie pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the heavy cream to the skillet and bring to a simmer. Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened.
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted. Season with salt to taste.
Add the cooked trofie pasta to the skillet and toss with the creamy sauce.
Stir in the roasted chestnuts and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until heated through.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
